What is BotLeague?

1.
Structured Events
Professionally organized robotics competitions run on a fixed seasonal calendar — so you can plan, prepare, and peak at the right moment.
2.
Digital Identity
Every builder gets a verified profile — your stats, rankings, event history, and achievements in one shareable portfolio.
3.
National Ranking
A transparent, points-based national ranking system that gives every team fair recognition — from first-timers to champions.
4.
Career Pathway
Top-ranked builders get direct connections to sponsors, colleges, and robotics companies actively scouting for talent.

Categories

Categories

Mini Makers
Mini Makers
Age 6 – 10
Build your first bot and take your first steps into the world of robotics — no experience required.
Learn more
Junior Innovators
Junior Innovators
Age 11 – 14
Level up your design and strategy skills. Compete in structured events with real elimination brackets.
Learn more

Young Engineers
Age 15 – 18
Advanced competition with full engineering challenges, sensors, autonomy, and national ranking points.
Learn more
Robo Minds
Robo Minds
Elite Pro & College
Championship-level league for top builders. Prize pools, sponsor spotlights, and national recognition.
Learn more

Sports

Competition Disciplines

Five arenas. One league. Pick your discipline and dominate the national circuit.

Robo Race
Speed-optimised bots race through precision obstacle courses.
Line Follower
Autonomous bots navigate complex line tracks at top speed.
RC Racing
High-speed remote-controlled racing across rugged arena tracks.
FPV Drone Racing & Autonomy
First-person drone racing through 3D gate courses at full tilt.
Robo Hockey
Bot-controlled hockey showdowns — raw strategy meets mechanical power.
Robo War
Combat bots battle to the last screw in the destruction arena.

Why Register?

The League Advantage

National Recognition
Earn a verified national ranking that follows your bot-building journey — from regional heats all the way to the championship finals.
Fair Judging
Transparent, standardised scoring rubrics reviewed by certified judges — every match is recorded, streamed, and open to appeal.
Career Ops
Bring your profile to career opportunities through direct connections to sponsors, engineering colleges, and robotics companies scouting for talent.
High-Energy Eco
Live-streamed events, crowd-judged hype rounds, sponsor showcases, and a community of thousands of builders across every city in India.
